kids_4_under.focus: Simple family celebration concepts, immediate family, basic party activities

questions.question: Who is your mom's mom called?
questions.answer: Grandmother or Grandma

questions.question: What do family members sing to you on your birthday?
questions.answer: Happy Birthday

questions.question: Who is your dad's brother?
questions.answer: Uncle

questions.question: What do family members give you on your birthday?
questions.answer: Presents or gifts

questions.question: Who is your mom's sister?
questions.answer: Aunt

questions.question: What sweet thing do families bring out to celebrate?
questions.answer: Birthday cake

questions.question: What do you make on your birthday that family members listen to?
questions.answer: A wish

questions.question: Which family member helps plan your birthday party?
questions.answer: Parent or family member (parents, mom, dad, etc.)

questions.answer: Gifts, cake, or presents

questions.question: Who is your brother's sister?
questions.answer: You or your sister

questions.answer: Any color or your favorite color

questions.question: Where do families often go to celebrate a birthday?
questions.answer: Home, restaurant, or park

questions.question: What do your relatives shout when you enter your birthday party?
questions.answer: Surprise or Happy Birthday

questions.question: How many candles does your family put on a birthday cake for someone turning 3?
questions.answer: Three

questions.answer: Play games, eat cake, or dance

questions.answer: Grandparents, aunts, uncles, or cousins

questions.answer: Your favorite meal or special food

questions.question: What does your family do with the birthday candles after you blow them out?
questions.answer: Take them off or throw them away

questions.question: What birthday tradition does your family repeat every year?
questions.answer: Cake, candles, singing, or party (any family tradition)

questions.answer: Happy Birthday or a nice message

questions.question: Who in your family teaches you how to cut the birthday cake?
questions.answer: Parent, mom, or dad

questions.answer: Eat cake or blow out candles

questions.answer: Grandfather or Grandpa

questions.question: How does your family help make your birthday special?
questions.answer: Planning, decorating, cooking, or spending time together

questions.question: What is a family tradition that gets passed down from grandparents?
questions.answer: Special recipes, games, songs, or customs

questions.question: What does your family promise to do every year for your birthday?
questions.answer: Celebrate, gather together, or have a tradition

questions.question: Which family member tells stories about your birth on your birthday?
questions.answer: Mom, dad, or grandparent

questions.question: What makes your family's birthday celebration different from other families?
questions.answer: Special traditions, recipes, or customs unique to your family

questions.question: Why does your family come together for birthdays?
questions.answer: To celebrate, bond, show love, or create memories

questions.question: What do all your family members do at the birthday party?
questions.answer: Sing, eat, give gifts, play games, or celebrate together

questions.question: What is the name of your dad's or mom's mom's mom?
questions.answer: Great-grandmother or great-grandma

questions.question: What do you do with your family to celebrate someone else's birthday?
questions.answer: Sing, eat cake, dance, play games, or give gifts

questions.question: What year was your grandma born?
questions.answer: Any reasonable year for a grandparent (accept approximate answers)

questions.question: How many cousins do you have at your birthday parties?
questions.answer: Number of cousins (any number is acceptable as open-ended)

questions.question: What is the most special thing about your family's birthday?
questions.answer: Family together, special food, love, traditions, or memories

questions.question: What does your family do that makes your birthday different from your friends' birthdays?
questions.answer: Unique traditions, special food, games, or family customs
